title: Greenidge Generation Statistics 2026 - Energy Focus and Market Position
text: Greenidge Generation 2026 Strategic Focus and Operational Statistics. Power Expansion Timeline: Expected 40 megawatts available at Mississippi expansion site by March 2027. Gained future access to 100MW of additional power in 2025. Represents nearly double of current capacity. Financial Position: Raised approximately $17.9 million in net proceeds from recent asset sales. Cash and bitcoin holdings approximately $9.8 million as of November 30 2025. Pro forma Net Debt improved to $12.4 million from $52.9 million at start of year. Debt Management Achievement: Reduced principal on 2026 senior indebtedness to approximately $37.8 million. Series of public and privately negotiated tender and exchange offers. Strategic Positioning: Deleveraging efforts intended to position company for growth opportunities heading into 2026. Focus on power market expansion as core strategic initiative. Infrastructure Development: Continued buildout of mining and power generation facilities. Operational Capacity: 106 MW natural-gas power plant and bitcoin datacenters in New York. Multi-state mining and power operations.
